form.formComment: Resumes from a six-and-a-half months spell and was a fresh up winner last time in, scoring over 390m at this track. Rates strongly and can return in winning form.

formComments.comment: Resumes from a six-and-a-half months spell and was a fresh up winner last time in, scoring over 390m at this track. Rates strongly and can return in winning form.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Collided on the first turn; Collided approaching the home turn.

form.formComment: Comes off a (16.67) win last time, scoring by half a length in a Grade 5 over 300m at Q Straight. Still a maiden from the draw but has placed three times. Looks a leading chance.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Comes off a (16.67) win last time, scoring by half a length in a Grade 5 over 300m at Q Straight. Still a maiden from the draw but has placed three times. Looks a leading chance.

form.formComment: Rocketed out of the boxes with a fast early split and gave a sight before being swamped late, finishing a 2.25 lengths fifth at Q Straight over 350m in 19.05. Looking to others this time.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Rocketed out of the boxes with a fast early split and gave a sight before being swamped late, finishing a 2.25 lengths fifth at Q Straight over 350m in 19.05. Looking to others this time.

form.formComment: Won two starts back when well in the market at Q Parklands over 520m. Last start finished last over 520m at Q Parklands beaten 14 lengths (30.56) behind Surrealist in a Grade 5 on March 1. Has clocked a scorching 21.44 here at this trip. Leading player.

form.formComment: Won two starts back at this track over 390m in 22.03. Couldn't repeat the feat last time out when sixth over 390m at this track at Free For All level. Hard to entertain this time.

form.formComment: Didn't make the placings last time at this track (25.55) in a Free For All, finishing a 5.5 lengths fifth. Goes very well from the draw boasting three victories and four places from eight starts. Others appear better placed.

form.formComment: Has been out of the money of late. Could only manage fourth last time out over 390m at this track. Cannot enthuse on this occasion.

form.formComment: Showed strong pace early but found one better when a 1.3 lengths second over 352m this track in 19.63. Racing well and can find winning form again.
